description_long: This is a four-story apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched, gabled roof. The facade features three rows of symmetrically arranged arched windows, each outlined with a contrasting trim, and three small dormer windows on the roof. The building's exterior is primarily a light beige color, accented with yellowish-brown trim around the windows and corners. The side and rear walls are plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, while the front is detailed and visually prominent. A single door is visible on the left side of the front facade, serving as the main entrance. The roof overhangs the building slightly, and the overall design suggests a traditional European or Victorian architectural influence.
description: A four-story beige apartment building with arched windows, yellow-brown trim, and a steep gabled roof with dormer windows. The front facade is detailed and symmetrical, while the sides and rear are plain.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with three rows of arched windows, yellow-brown trim, and a single entrance door on the left.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain wall with the gabled roof and dormer windows visible on top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a featureless wall with no windows or doors, and the roof overhang is visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another plain wall, with the gabled roof and dormer windows extending above.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in three horizontal rows per floor, evenly spaced and vertically aligned, with arched tops and consistent trim.
